name: od-react-export
title: Export to React
description: Starter downstream export plugin for turning an accepted Open Design artifact into a React component handoff.

description_i18n.en: Starter downstream export plugin for turning an accepted Open Design artifact into a React component handoff.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 入门级下游导出插件：把已 accept 的 Open Design 产物转成 React 组件交付。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 入門級下游匯出外掛：把已 accept 的 Open Design 產物轉成 React 元件交付。
description_i18n.ja: 受理済みの Open Design アーティファクトを React コンポーネントのハンドオフへ変換する、入門用ダウンストリームエクスポートプラグイン。
description_i18n.ko: 수락된 Open Design 산출물을 React 컴포넌트 핸드오프로 변환하는 입문용 다운스트림 익스포트 플러그인.
description_i18n.de: Einsteiger-Downstream-Export: macht aus einem akzeptierten Open-Design-Artefakt eine React-Komponenten-Übergabe.
description_i18n.fr: Plugin d'export downstream de démarrage pour transformer un artefact Open Design accepté en handoff de composant React.
description_i18n.ru: Стартовый downstream-экспорт-плагин: превращает принятый артефакт Open Design в передачу React-компонента.
description_i18n.es: Plugin de exportación downstream inicial para convertir un artefacto aceptado de Open Design en un handoff de componente React.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Plugin de exportação downstream inicial para transformar um artefato aceito do Open Design em handoff de componente React.
description_i18n.it: Plugin di export downstream iniziale per trasformare un artefatto Open Design accettato in un handoff di componente React.
description_i18n.vi: Plugin xuất downstream khởi đầu, chuyển artifact Open Design đã accept thành bàn giao component React.
description_i18n.pl: Startowa wtyczka eksportu downstream: zamienia zaakceptowany artefakt Open Design w handoff komponentu React.
description_i18n.id: Plugin ekspor downstream pemula untuk mengubah artifact Open Design yang diterima menjadi handoff komponen React.
description_i18n.nl: Starter-downstream-exportplug-in: zet een geaccepteerd Open Design-artefact om naar een React-component-overdracht.
description_i18n.ar: إضافة تصدير لاحق تمهيدية تحوّل عنصر Open Design المقبول إلى تسليم مكوّن React.
description_i18n.tr: Kabul edilmiş bir Open Design çıktısını React bileşeni devrine dönüştüren başlangıç downstream dışa aktarma eklentisi.
description_i18n.uk: Стартовий downstream-плагін експорту: перетворює прийнятий артефакт Open Design на передачу React-компонента.

query.en: Export the accepted Open Design artifact to a React 18 + TypeScript component. Preserve the visual system, extract reusable props only where they clarify intent, and finish with integration notes.
query.zh-CN: 将已确认的 Open Design 产物导出为 React 18 + TypeScript 组件。保持视觉系统一致，只在有助于表达意图时抽出可复用 props，并在最后给出集成说明。
